strings.panel.p2.bubble.center.html: So, "girlfriend," what say you and me?...
strings.panel.p2.bubble.right.html: Um, don't you think that battle was awfully easy?
strings.panel.p3.bubble.center.html: Hey, when you're rad, you're bad.
strings.panel.p3.bubble.right.html: I mean, maybe that wasn't the boss's...
